notes./places/microsoft.graph.room: Graph v1.0 findRoom/findRooms uses this cast segment; OpenAPI in the msgraph index may list graph.room under different path spelling.
notes./places/microsoft.graph.roomList: Same as room cast; index may use graph.roomList.
notes./planner/taskDetails/{dynamic}: Planner task details singleton; not always indexed under the same FTS tokens as /planner/tasks.
notes.{dynamic}/lists/{dynamic}/tasks/{dynamic: Inventory merges template tail (e.g. task id + OData query) into one placeholder; still valid runtime paths.
notes.{dynamic}/recent{dynamic}: Template concatenates path + query suffix without a slash in the static analysis pattern.
notes.{dynamic}/{dynamic}: Too generic for OpenAPI disambiguation (parent + child id only).
notes.{dynamic}/{dynamic}/contacts{dynamic}: contacts + query concatenated in template literal.
notes.{dynamic}/{dynamic}{dynamic}: Adjacent template spans without separator in pattern string.
notes.{dynamic}{dynamic}:/content: DriveItem colon segment (`root:/path:/content`) collapsed by pattern extraction.
